name: khuym
description: Khuym: validate-first multi-agent skills for phase contracts, stories, swarming, execution, and visual learning artifacts

interface.shortDescription: Validate-first skills for agentic software delivery
interface.longDescription: Bundles the Khuym workflow skills and standalone utilities for phase planning, story mapping, validation, swarming, review, visual learning artifacts, and learning capture.
defaultPrompt: Onboard this repository for Khuym and start with using-khuym.
Help me route a feature request through the full Khuym workflow.
Plan and validate a feature before we write code.
Create a visual learning artifact for this codebase or concept.
